data.content: Plan: Use Playwright MCP to navigate to localhost:3210/beats?repo=%2FUsers%2Fcartine%2Ffoolery and capture screenshots for all 8 views (queues, active, human-action, retakes, history, hot-keys, dispatch-simple, dispatch-advanced). Save to docs/screenshots/ replacing existing files. The thumbnails in the README table and the larger inline screenshots both reference the same files.
